title: Absurdly Optimized
description: An incredible and simple optimization modpack!
body:
# Want higher FPS than other modpacks? Get this one!
important: set your max fps in video settings to the amount that you want

- VERY researched
- Uses niche optimization mods that work really well
- Gets more than 750 fps in certain situations and over 200 in normal gameplay

Based on "Simply Optimized" Absurdly Optimized provides much better and more stable performance by adding performance mods that they didn't use!

The next section was made measuring the highest fps on fancy graphics on 12 chunks of render distance without vsync and with the same seed.
# Compared fairly with other modpacks:
- **Fabulously Optimized:** Not moving: 424 fps | while moving: 372 fps
- **Simply Optimized:** Not moving: 506 fps | while moving: 375 fps
- **Absurdly Optimized:** Not moving: 534 fps | while moving: 438 fps

Note: Even if you don't need fps this high, the modpack being capable means that you will be able to run minecraft without your computer getting as hot! And you'll get less lag spikes!
